name: No Peek Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the stew meat and soups together.
2. Divide the mixture into 4 portions (for 2 adults and 1 toddler) and freeze in ziplock baggies.
3. The night before cooking day, remove a baggie from the freezer and pour the contents into a crockpot. Cover with half a can of ginger ale (the meat mix can be used frozen, but thawing is recommended).
4. Add carrots and potatoes to the crockpot and cook on medium heat for the entire day.
5. If cooking will be rushed on the morning, cut the potatoes and carrots ahead of time and refrigerate them in water with a little lemon juice to prevent browning.
